lines.speaker: Stankers
lines.text: Yes, I use them to transport coal over the river. I will let other people use them too, I'm a nice person like that...

lines.speaker: Stankers
lines.text: Just put coal in a truck and I'll move it down to my depot over the river.

lines.speaker: Stankers
lines.text: Would you like a poison chalice?

lines.speaker: Stankers
lines.text: It's an exciting drink I've invented. I don't know what it tastes like, I haven't tried it myself.
